ab: undukay na taqsian deddan tangi, muwaza nipasayan na taqsian tu simsuqasan.
ch: 今天是學校的運動會，學校舉辦了許多競賽。
en: Today was the school's sports day, and the school organized many competitions.

ab: azu ti simtebes tu Rais, semippiq tu mali, manubi, salekiaw, pemani.
ch: 有拔河、足球、跑步、跳舞和射箭。
en: There were tug of war, soccer, running, dancing, and archery.
I participated in the running competition.

ab: meRaRiw iku nani, mesuRaw ti iku, meRinang ti tusuz ku.
ch: 當我跑步的時候，我跌倒了，膝蓋流血了。
en: When I was running, I fell down, and my knees were bleeding.

ab: wanayka masengat ti iku muman meRaRiw.
ch: 但我站起來，繼續向前跑。
en: But I stood up and continued running forward.

ab: maseq ti iku ta qaseqan nani, melilizaq ti meniz.
ch: 我到終點時所有人都很開心。
en: Everyone was happy when I reached the finish line.

ab: mai iku mala tu saqaussiq sayzi, wanayka mulepun iku tu simsuqasan zau, Raqana melizaq iku.
ch: 雖然沒有獲得第一名，但我完成了比賽，所以我很高興。
en: Although I didn't get first place, I'm glad because I completed the race.
